'''jaradha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeerust|zeerust]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeerust|zeerust]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jaradha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jærædhæth|jærædhæth]] || [[word:jærædhæj|jærædhæj]] || [[word:jærædhæsh|jærædhæsh]] || [[word:jærædhæ|jærædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jararadhath|jararadhath]] || [[word:jararadhaj|jararadhaj]] || [[word:jararadhash|jararadhash]] || [[word:jararadha|jararadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaradhath|jaradhath]] || [[word:jaradhaj|jaradhaj]] || [[word:jaradhash|jaradhash]] || [[word:jaradha|jaradha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jarafdhath|jarafdhath]] || [[word:jarafdhaj|jarafdhaj]] || [[word:jarafdhash|jarafdhash]] || [[word:jarafdhaf|jarafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaradhatha|jaradhatha]] || [[word:jaradhaja|jaradhaja]] || [[word:jaradhasha|jaradhasha]] || [[word:jaradhaka|jaradhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaradhath|jaradhath]] || [[word:jaradhaj|jaradhaj]] || [[word:jaradhash|jaradhash]] || [[word:jaradha|jaradha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaradhathal|jaradhathal]] || [[word:jaradhajal|jaradhajal]] || [[word:jaradhashal|jaradhashal]] || [[word:jaradhakal|jaradhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaradhathatha|jaradhathatha]] || [[word:jaradhajaja|jaradhajaja]] || [[word:jaradhashasha|jaradhashasha]] || [[word:jaradhaka|jaradhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaradhathan|jaradhathan]] || [[word:jaradhajan|jaradhajan]] || [[word:jaradhashan|jaradhashan]] || [[word:jaradhakan|jaradhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaradhathaoro|jaradhathaoro]] || [[word:jaradhajaoro|jaradhajaoro]] || [[word:jaradhashaoro|jaradhashaoro]] || [[word:jaradhakaoro|jaradhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
